audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. Fork trigger fires exactly once via three-layer defense: (1) slot guard at L54 restricts fork checks to first slot of each epoch only, (2) epoch equality at L77 matches only when current_epoch equals FULU_FORK_EPOCH, (3) variant guard in upgrade_state_to_fulu (fulu.rs:47 as_electra_mut) prevents re-application if state is already Fulu variant.
